proposed_tasks.instructions: Locate and ingest source records related to Napier accommodation arrears. Check matter memory, prior task outputs, and any external repositories (e.g., university housing records, correspondence, payment ledgers). If records exist but are not yet ingested, use available tools to add them as source materials. If no records are found, document the gap and request human assistance to obtain records.
proposed_tasks.title: Ingest Napier accommodation arrears source records from available repositories
